title: The Shepherdess.
content:
Shepherdess! Shepherdess!
        Looks to the sheep;
    Shepherdess! Shepherdess!
        Watches their sleep.

    Shepherdess! Shepherdess!
        When they cry "Baa,"
    Shepherdess! Shepherdess!
        Knows where they are.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Richard Hunter delivers a powerful performance in "The Shepherdess."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
